Name: CHARACTER_INIT_PARAM
Description: Determines the loadout parameters for Armored Core type characters.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Base Recovery Speed: MP
Fields.Description: MP recovery amount per second.

Fields.Name: Base Recovery Speed: Stamina
Fields.Description: Stamina recovery amount per second.

Fields.Name: Fall Damage Correction %
Fields.Description: Damage reduction amount (%) that can serve as a cushion when being attacked from above by another character.

Fields.Name: Souls
Fields.Description: Amount of souls you have at the beginning.
